summary: Plan-only live PR inventory shard. No shared canonical was supplied; every hydrated open PR is kept independent. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or security-route action is planned.

actions.reason: No hydrated evidence supports duplicate, superseded, fixed-by-candidate, low-signal closeout, or security quarantine; keep open as an independent PR.
